name: aivideos-stocksbrew
description: Brainrot short-form video pipeline — Runway avatar + gameplay bg + subtitles. Cron-driven.

scripts.fb-test: .venv/bin/python -c "from lib import firebase; import json; print(json.dumps(firebase.smoke_test(), indent=2))"
scripts.buffer-test: .venv/bin/python -c "from lib import buffer; import json; print(json.dumps(buffer.smoke_test_direct(), indent=2))"
scripts.cloudinary-test: .venv/bin/python -c "from lib import hosting; import json; print(json.dumps(hosting.smoke_test(), indent=2))"
scripts.list-avatars: .venv/bin/python -c "from lib import avatar; import json; print(json.dumps(avatar.list_avatars(), indent=2))"
